mapper.sql: id, external_id, title, url, description, category_id, sidebar_id, favicon, pinned, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: select cards.*, c.name as category_name from cards LEFT JOIN category c ON cards.category_id = c.id where cards.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND cards.deleted_at IS NULL

select cards.*, c.name as category_name from cards LEFT JOIN category c ON cards.category_id = c.id where cards.sidebar_id = #{sidebarId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND cards.deleted_at IS NULL order by pinned DESC, updated_at DESC
select cards.*, c.name as category_name from cards LEFT JOIN category c ON cards.category_id = c.id where cards.deleted_at IS NULL order by pinned DESC, updated_at DESC

SELECT c.name as name, COUNT(cr.id) as cardCount, COALESCE(SUM(cl.count), 0) as clickCount FROM category c LEFT JOIN cards cr ON c.id = cr.category_id AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN clicks cl ON cr.id = cl.card_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.sort_order ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC

SELECT s.label as name, s.id as sidebarId, COUNT(cr.id) as cardCount, COALESCE(SUM(cl.count), 0) as clickCount FROM sidebar s LEFT JOIN cards cr ON s.id = cr.sidebar_id AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN clicks cl ON cr.id = cl.card_id WHERE s.id != 'dashboard' GROUP BY s.id, s.label, s.sort_order ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: insert into cards (id, external_id, title, url, description, category_id, sidebar_id, favicon, pinned, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{externalId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sidebarId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{favicon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deletedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into cards
id, external_id, title, url, description, category_id, sidebar_id, favicon, pinned, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{externalId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sidebarId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{favicon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deletedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update cards
external_id = #{externalId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sidebar_id = #{sidebarId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, favicon = #{favicon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pinned = #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND deleted_at IS NULL

update cards set external_id = #{externalId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sidebar_id = #{sidebarId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, favicon = #{favicon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pinned = #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND deleted_at IS NULL
update cards set deleted_at = NOW() where sidebar_id = #{sidebarId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND deleted_at IS NULL
